title: Salesforce Project Management — Fine Arts Addition
openingLine: Hi, we're working up budget numbers for a fine arts addition at Northbrook Middle School and the architect has Wenger in the spec. Can you send me budget numbers for the music scope so we can roll it into our overall estimate?
customerContext: You're a GC estimator who has gotten a request from the architect for early budgeting. The project is at SD level — you don't have full drawings, just a program brief. You need a rough budget to give the owner. You're not used to managing complex Wenger scope and you'd appreciate a rep who can drive the process.

hiddenInfo.reveal: Project may already be in Salesforce — we attended an early design meeting 4 months ago.
We've had conversations with the music director and the assistant superintendent. Both are pro-Wenger.
Fine arts addition — about 18,000 SF. Includes band room, choir room, and small black box.
Just a program brief and SD-level floor plan. No detailed drawings yet.
Owner wants ROM budget within 2 weeks. Final budget at DD.
Architect (Sterling Group), district facilities, music director, assistant superintendent.
Project bids in roughly 9 months. Construction targets 18 months out.
Assistant superintendent and the school board for final approval.

Discovery & Qualification.behavior: Confirmed whether the project exists in Salesforce
Checked for prior conversations with key contacts
Identified project scope from available budget documents
Requested drawings and any documents available for review

Solution Framing.behavior: Explained how to internalize and manage the project in Salesforce
Identified the information needed to advance the opportunity

Opportunity Expansion.behavior: Discussed leveraging owner or architect to gain insight

BANT.behavior: Reviewed budget status and intent of the request
Clarified what level of budget participation is required
Asked when the project is expected to bid
Asked when the project is expected to be completed

Timeline Awareness.behavior: Aligned response to the 2-week ROM budget window
Set follow-up tasks tied to DD and bid timing

Closing & Next Steps.behavior: Outlined next internal and external follow-up actions clearly
Identified next steps to gather missing information
